title: correct assignment of networkStatus
body:
once we changed configureNetNS to return a result beyond an error,
we need to make sure that we used locals instead of ctr attributes
when determining networks.

Resolves #1752

Signed-off-by: baude <bbaude@redhat.com>

comments.body: LGTM, nice pickup on the 1 to 0 bit.

@baude: you cannot LGTM your own PR.

<details>

@baude, @mheon, @rhatdan can we draft another release including this fix?

I just noticed that DNS in containers is broken without this patch (at least on openSUSE Tumblweed).
